feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Datasphere
feed.subtitle: SAP Datasphere Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Moving Average Trend calculation
entry.content:
I need to convert a Moving Average Trend calculation from BW into Datasphere. Purpose is to calculate a Rolling 12 months for each month in a complete year (e.g. DEC2023 must show data from JAN2023-DEC2023, NOV2023 must show data from DEC2022-NOV2023 etc).

This is calculated in BW via a replacement path with the "Current Member" functionality, which results in the correct information without multiplying the amount of records.

I was able to create the same calculation in Datasphere, where I start by creating a view that maps one month (e.g. DEC2023) with all necessary months to become the same calculation (being JAN2023-DEC2023). After joining this temperarily view to the original data view, the result is correct but the amount of records is multiplied by 12 due to these month mapping. It is also not possible to use an aggregation operator, because every month in the data view is linked to 12 months for the calculation.

My question: is there another way to implement this Moving Average Calculation to avoid the multiplication of the number of records?

Kind regards,

Lieven

entry.title: datasphere intelligent lookup - error: No deployed version available
entry.content:
Hi there,

in SAP Datasphere I created an intelligent lookup with two tables

  • input: local table (Big Rock List)
  • lookup: remote table (Accounting General Data in Customer Master), data is replicated
  • rule: exact match with names, no case sensitivity deselected

After deployment I run the lookup and get an error: No deployed version available

But for sure, both tables are deployed.

Any idea, what is wrong?

entry.title: Datasphere currency conversion issue
entry.content:
Hello everyone.

I have tried to model a view on with a currency conversion in free-plan tenant Datasphere like in this exercises - https://github.com/SAP-archive/data-warehouse-cloud-modeling/tree/main/exercises/ex3/internal-orders-currency-conversion. I also took data from there.

As a result I get an error like this: "The query executed with errors. Caught exception : exception 70000719: Conversion( "CurrencyConversionMeasure" ), row 0: could not determine valid conversion rate for value(s) 480976 from unit 'USD' to unit 'EUR' on date 2010-11-17 00:00:00.0000000 because of an error during rate lookup: invalid conversion type was found in "ABWCT" column". 

If I delete that record in TCURF or replace ABWCT=EURX with empty value, I get: "could not determine valid conversion rate for value(s) 480976 from unit 'USD' to unit 'EUR' on date 2010-11-17 00:00:00.0000000"

I have tried to use CURRENCY_CONVERSION function in calculated column, currency conversion column (in View and in Analytical model); different dates and currencies; generate currency views in Datasphere, but result is the same. Are there any restrictions for free-plan tenants?

entry.title: SAP Datasphere IDP, IAS protocol support?
entry.content:
We can switch some BTP Services to use OIDC with IAS, a simpler method than Saml. However, SAP Datasphere seems limited to Saml. Is this because it's built on older tech not supporting OIDC?
I reviewed this link: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/9f804b8efa8043539289f42f372c4862/9b26536159354IAS, OIDCaea9024a99cbbe60b4e.html?q=sap%20datasphere%20SAC

Action & Inquiry

  • Seeking to confirm if anyone has successfully integrated IAS OIDC with SAP Datasphere.
  • Advise on next steps for using IAS OIDC for SAP Datasphere.

Appreciate any guidance,

Wallace

entry.title: Will not allow a new table because object already exists in the repository, when it doesn't
entry.content:
Hi, I made in error when naming a dataflow and wanted to change it, but obviously you can only change the Business Name and not the Technical Name.

So I deleted the dataflow completely and the table it feeds into.

When recreating the dataflow it won't allow the same name to be used as it "already exists in the repository"

I can confirm that it doesn't - I have checked via Data Builder and Repository Explorer.

I'm keen to ensure that I don't have to add spurious _V2 suffixes and the like.

Anyone know how to convince it that the table has truly left the building?

entry.title: Consume data from Datasphere to BAS
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying out the new btp service 'Datasphere', with a free plan. I am trying to transmit data from a space to a Fiori app in the BAS, via oData.
If I search via url

"https://<tenant>/dwaas-core/odata/v4/consumption/relational/<space>/<view>/<view>"

I see the data, but when I make an oData call it gives me an error, if I try to create a destination with the Oauth generated by datasphere it gives me a credential error (but I have tried them all).

I was wondering if the reasoning of being able to connect via odata the DBHANA of datasphere with a Fiori app is right?

Has anyone ever done such a thing?
Is there a direct connection between BAS and Datasphere?

Thank you for your answers.

entry.title: Parameter Passing in Power BI from Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello all! 

I would like to modify the parameters of  my Analytical Model (Datasphere) in Power BI. 

I tried solution of SQL in Power BI from :

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-q-a/analytic-model-in-power-bi/qaq-p/12783415

But it is not working. 

Does anyone have a hint for this?

Thanks!

entry.title: Monitoring Capacity Units (CU) consumption
entry.content:
Hi, 

I'm in a team developing SAP Datasphere as a transformation and modeling tool, we're using it with SAP HANA on premise as a data warehouse, that's why all the tables we'll be consuming in SAP Datasphere would be remote. For that reason, we're interested in monitoring the CU consumption and identify possible considerations we might have to review. The problem is that we've been doing research and exploring the plattform but couldn't find something that guide us into this solution. So, we need support to find the way to monitor the CU consumption, to have the neccesary insights to evaluate the performances of the project.

Thank you in advance.


SAP Datasphere

entry.title: Data Access Control in Datasphere not working correctly for SAC users with Concurrent Licenses
entry.content: We've set up a Data Access Control in Datasphere for reports we've created for our Suppliers. In the DAC we've set up every Supplier to only see their own data. We've discovered an issue where Suppliers are seeing data for other Suppliers. There's nothing wrong with DAC or how we've set up our stories. After looking into it, we realized that we only have these issues with Users who have concurrent licenses. Outside of switching from Concurrent licenses to Named User, is there a way to fix this bug with the Data Access Controls?

entry.title: Achieving Real-Time S/4HANA Cloud Data Replication in SAP Datasphere Without DP Agent
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I'm looking for a solution to archieve real-time data replication from S/4HANA Cloud to SAP Datasphere without using an on-premise Data Provisioning Agent. Without a DP agent, currently it seems we're limited to Data Flows and Replication Flows, which don't support real-time replication or remote table access for views. Is this right?

Has anyone managed to bypass the need for a DP Agent to enable real-time replication and remote table functionality? I've checked the roadmap but found no hints for this functionality (https://roadmaps.sap.com/board?range=2023Q1-2025Q1&PRODUCT=73555000100800002141#Q1%202024). 

Best regards
Tim

entry.title: Modeling Suggestion in DATASPHERE and SAC
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I am doing a greenfield implementation for a client.

Need your suggestions regarding the modeling approach for spaces and SAC.

We are planning to have separate SPACES for different functions (eg: SD, MM,FI) and one space for administrative data ( for applying DAC). is this the right approach to be followed?

also i want to restrict users in SAC stories. So planning to create folders for different functionalities like in space and add only required users into that folder. is there any other approach available in SAC.

 

Best regards,

Amith

entry.title: SAP Datasphere , Dataflow read from CSV, random number of rows
entry.content:
After the last update,

in SAP Datasphere,

I have some dataflows that read from CSV files from a SFTP.

Now after the last update they extract a random number of rows.

The same dataflows in a quality tenant (with the same connections) read correctly every row from the files.

In production tenant the files read a random number of rows.

Dataflows do not show errors.

I tried to transport the dataflow from quality to production => did not work (did not solve the issue).

I try to change the default separator from ',' to '\t' => did not work (did not solve the issue).

I try to rewrite it from scratch =>did notwork (did not solve the issue).

I try to change batch size (on/off) =>did notwork (did not solve the issue).

 

Are there some common issue that cloud connector could be affected of?

This is a really bad issue as the flow was working from the beginning of the development, now it read a random number of rows!!! without failing or throwing any error

entry.title: SAP DataSphere Lifecicle Transports
entry.content:
Hello guys,

I'm trying find out a way to transport ROLES from a DataSphere Tennant to another one.

I can use Import/Export for a lot of DSP objects but none of them is Roles.
Even with CLI documentation do not mention anything about roles, specifically.

So, are you guys know about it whether it is possible or not or even if there are any specific documentation?

Appreciate any tips.

Thanks

Rogerio

entry.title: Not Getting options to create Spaces in Space Management.
entry.content:
I have created new instance for sap datasphere, free plan in my BTP Tenant.

After going to the datasphere dashboard, I am not getting the option to create space even after assigning all the roles to the user.

entry.title: Does DSP has some function to define a set of rules and setting to create a concept for analysis ...
entry.content:
As per using a SAP BW we can use infoobject  or even creating tables "z" to support some definition or rules or settings and also develop a transaction for a business user to maintain such definitions.

Of course this is to be used for analytic purpose. A king of an extension of a master data

Is there a way to do the same with datasphere or what is the way to support this need?

entry.title: SAP Datasphere Currency Calculation incorrect - Why?
entry.content:
Dear Community,

I've been working with SAP Datasphere for almost 1 year now, but did not use currency conversion so far.

This is my first try, but somehow the result is not like expected and I hope to find experts here, to explain why this is...

I used the two SAP Help pages for my example:

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/c8a54ee704e94e15926551293243fd1d/b462239ffb644d9baab4442a10a72edf.html 

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/c8a54ee704e94e15926551293243fd1d/6e3d8bed7ece4c27ba10e2cc523915fe.html 

I'm sorry for all the German column names - my example was not intended to become a community question!

I created one simple source table with Date, Value in Local Currency (USD) and Target Currency (EUR):

My conversion is executed via a graphical view and a calculated currency conversion column:

This view is contained in a dataflow, where I then fill the calculated column into my 2nd local table column:

So far so good ... but when you compare the "Wert in SW" which is the converted statistics currency, then I cannot find the right TCURR values for this calculation 😞

See here the source from my S4 system, and the loaded remote table data in my Datasphere Space:

I have only 1 set of TCUR* tables in the whole Datasphere tenant... so there is no other table containing different values.

Does anybody see in the above shown settings, how these strange values are caluclated?

When you convert USD in EUR and with the rate of Jan 9th 2023, this was: 1/ 1,07213 = 0,9327, almost what you can find via google:

So, this means, my 100 USD should be worth 93,27 EUR... but Datasphere converted: 106,40 EUR.

It does not seem like a technical error, since I chose "Set to null" in case of errors.

Any idea from the experts here?

Did anybody test this already, did you have similar issues in the beginning?

Any help appreciated 🙂

Thanks, Martin

entry.title: How can I connect my HDI Container of my SAP Hana Cloud with my SAP Datasphere?
entry.content:
Hi everyone,

I need help with this problem. I need to extract some data from an HDI Container in my Hana Cloud to use in my PowerBi. However, I cannot access the data because it says I don't have permission. I have already tried to use the SAP Data Datasphere trial. So, here is my question: how can I connect my HDI Container in my SAP Hana Cloud with SAP Data Intelligence? All my accounts are free, so is there some problem? I created this HDI Container with the SAP BAS.

entry.title: MultiProvider/CompositeProvider scenario in Datasphere
entry.content:
Hello Expert,

In BW, we have a multi-provider/composite provider concept where union operation is performed. Here, we can assign individual characteristics and key figures from a particular or multiple aDSOs (cubes/DSOs).

Also, MD dimensions' tables automatically get associated with TD facts' table (Thanks to the SID concept). Then the dimensions with their attributes and texts can be used in BW queries.

What is a similar artifact in Datasphere that behaves like a MultiProvider/Composite provider?

Also, like BW, is the dimension and fact association done automatically in Datasphere as well? If not, what is the parallel for it in Datasphere?

Thanks!

Regards,

Mandar Damle

entry.title: How to create a sequence number in SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi Everyone,

How to create a sequence number in SAP Datasphere transformation flow just like how we create in Informatica?

Thanks,
Samrat Muddasani

entry.title: Hierarchy with directory issue when sharing with other spaces
entry.content:
Hi Expert,

In ADMIN Space : 

I created a hierarchical with directory and associated it with the Master Dimension. Then I associated the master dimension with the fact. so I created Analytics model from the fact and dispplay data.

I able to set hierarchy for Cost Center. then I share the fact, the masters and the hierarchy to HR space.

In HR Space :

I Created Analytics Model from the Fact and previewd the data.

I found below error 

I try to unshare the Hierarchy with Directory so that this space does not have a Hierarchy with Directory. Then I tried previewing data; it worked, but I couldn't set the hierarchy.

Do you have any solutions for this problem?
